response.overview: After Zvone gets diagnosed with dementia, he tries his hardest to cling to the remaining pieces of the memories he still has left within him because he doesn't wish to loose his identity. His daughter Nena is heartbroken at her father's state and decides to take over as the new head of the household, despite the role reversal being as much of a shock to her as it is to him.
response.title: Čepić
